name: Release of Invalid Pointer or Reference
description: The product attempts to release a resource using an invalid pointer or reference, such as freeing memory that was not dynamically allocated, freeing an already-freed pointer, or using a mismatched deallocation function, leading to memory corruption or code execution.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM(free/release) is called on a pointer or reference that is invalid: either not originally allocated by a matching TRANSFORM(allocation), already freed, or pointing to an incorrect address. Look for deallocation without prior valid allocation in the same scope.
